---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Describe the limitation or gap you're experiencing.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Constraints

RepoMem has hard constraints — please confirm your proposal respects them:

- [ ] No external dependencies (stdlib only)
- [ ] No network calls or API keys
- [ ] No telemetry
- [ ] All hooks exit 0 (never block Claude Code)

## Additional context

Any other context, examples, or screenshots.
